zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina de Chalfunte於大約1334年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安時，她的父親Sir Henry de Chalfunte36歲，母親Maude Garound21歲。她於1364年與Thomas Waller在英國肯特斯培爾度爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1400年在英國素可藍爾爾斯特享年67歲。

zh-hans.Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安
zh-hans.Speldhurst, Kent, England: 英国肯特斯培爾度爾斯特
zh-hans.Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina de Chalfunte于大约1334年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Chalfunte36岁，母亲Maude Garound21岁。她于1364年与Thomas Waller在英国肯特斯培爾度爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1400年在英国素可藍爾爾斯特享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Christina de Chalfunte was born about 1334, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Henry de Chalfunte, was 36 and her mother, Maude Garound, was 21. She married Thomas Waller in 1364, in Speldhurst, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1400, in Lamberhurst, Sussex, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina de Chalfunte est née environ 1334, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Chalfunte, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maude Garound, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Waller en 1364, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Lamberhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina de Chalfunte um 1334 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Chalfunte 36 und ihre Mutter Maude Garound 21. Sie hat 1364 in Speldhurst, Kent, England Thomas Waller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Lamberhurst, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina de Chalfunte è nata il circa 1334 nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry de Chalfunte, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Maude Garound, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Waller nel 1364, nel Speldhurst, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1400, nel Lamberhurst, Sussex, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina de Chalfunteが約1334年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Chalfunteは36歳，母Maude Garoundは21歳であった。1364年にイギリスケントスペルドハルストでThomas Wallerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1400年にイギリススセックスランバーハルストで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina de Chalfunte(이)가 대략 1334년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Chalfunte(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Garound(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 Thomas Waller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 수세스 램후르스트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1365: de 9 de janeiro de 1365 a 8 de janeiro de 1366
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina de Chalfunte nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Chalfunte, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maude Garound, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Waller em 1364, em Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1400, em Lamberhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina de Chalfunte родилась около 1334 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Chalfunte было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Garound, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Waller в 1364 г. в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности лэмбирурст, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

Se casó con Thomas Waller en 1364, en Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1400, en Lamberhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
